overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt running along a rural dirt path through a blooming spring orchard. The character passes through a stone gate into a dense grove of white-flowering fruit trees where peasant workers are harvesting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path with wooden fencing and stone walls

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the dirt path toward a stone gate in the distance, passing wooden fences and stone walls

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running alongside the left side of the path
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass and wagon ruts
low stone wall constructed from irregular field stones
tall deciduous tree leaning over the path with dense green foliage
tall stone tower visible on the horizon against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wide-open rural dirt path bordered by wooden fences and stone walls. The landscape features green grass fields and scattered trees under a bright clear sky, with a distant stone tower visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gate entrance to blooming orchard

events.description: passes between the stone gateposts into the blooming orchard area

agents.ego_description: running through the stone gate and entering the orchard, transitioning from open fields to the tree-lined path

entered.detail: paired stone pillars marking the entrance to the orchard, constructed from stacked stones
rows of trees covered in dense white blossoms creating a canopy over the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a stone gate into a blooming orchard. The scene transitions from open countryside to a semi-enclosed space with white-flowering trees lining the dirt path. The stone walls shift to the right side as the character enters the grove.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense fruit orchard with harvest workers

events.description: encounters peasant workers harvesting fruit among the blooming trees

agents.ego_description: running through the dense orchard rows, passing peasant workers who are harvesting fruit from the trees

notable_agents.action: peasant worker bending down to pick fruit from a low branch
peasant worker standing near a tree with a harvest basket

entered.detail: wooden basket on the ground used for collecting harvested fruit

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the dense orchard where the tree canopy creates dappled lighting on the path. Peasant workers are visible among the trees harvesting fruit into wooden baskets. The environment is lush with white blossoms surrounding the trail on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open rural landscape into the sheltered depths of a blooming spring orchard. It begins with the character running along a wide dirt path bordered by wooden fences and stone walls, with green fields and a distant stone tower under a bright, clear sky. As the character approaches a stone gate, the scene transitions from the open countryside into a semi-enclosed grove where white-flowering trees begin to line the trail. The camera then moves deeper into the dense orchard, where the open light shifts to dappled patterns beneath a thick canopy of blossoms. Finally, the path becomes fully enclosed by lush white trees as peasant workers appear among the branches, harvesting fruit into wooden baskets.
